name: Drop
description: Drop is an open-source game distribution platform similar to Steam/GameVault. Manage your game library, track playtime, and organize your collection with a modern web interface.

notes.text: Installs from the develop branch of the Drop repository.
Requires PostgreSQL database which is automatically configured during installation.
Builds torrential (Rust component) for torrent support.
Access the web interface on port 3000. The Node.js backend runs on port 4000 internally.
To retrieve the setup URL after installation, run: journalctl -u drop -b0 --no-pager | grep -oP 'Open \Khttps?://[^\s]+'
